back_translation: I charge you in the presence of God and Jesus Christ, who will judge the living and the dead, and with reference to his appearing and his kingdom
Preach the word; be ready in seasons that are suitable and unsuitable; rebuke, admonish, encourage, with patience and teaching of every form
For there will come a time when people will not be able to endure correct teaching, but according to their own desires they will gather around themselves teachers, having ears that crave to hear
And they will turn their ears away from the truth, and turn aside to false stories
But as for you, be sober in all things, endure suffering, do the work of a proclaimer of the gospel, and fulfill your ministry
For I am already being poured out like a drink offering, and the time of my departure has arrived
I have fought well in that struggle, I have run to the end of the course, I have kept the faith
Finally, the crown of righteousness has been laid up for me, which the Lord, the righteous Judge, will award me on that day — and not only to me, but also to all who have loved his appearing
Make every effort to come to me quickly
For Demas has forsaken me because he loves the world of this present age, and he traveled to the city of Thessalonica; Crescens to the province of Galatia, Titus to the province of Dalmatia
Only Luke is with me. Go and get Mark and bring him with you, because he is useful to me in the ministry-work
As for Tychicus, I have sent him to the city of Ephesus
When you come, please bring the cloak that I left at the city of Troas with Carpus, and the various books, especially the parchment scrolls
Alexander the coppersmith did much harm to me. The Lord will repay him according to his deeds
You also must beware of him, because he vigorously opposed our message
At my first defense, no one stood beside me at all, but everyone forsook me. May this not be reckoned as a fault against them
But the Lord stood beside me and strengthened me, so that the gospel would be fully proclaimed through me, and so that all the Gentiles would hear, and I was rescued from the mouth of the lion
The Lord will rescue me from every evil deed, and will save me into his heavenly kingdom. May glory be to him forever and ever, amen
Send greetings to Prisca, Aquila, and the family of Onesiphorus
Erastus has remained at the city of Corinth; as for Trophimus, I left him at the city of Miletus while he was sick
Make every effort to come before winter. Eubulus, Pudens, Linus, Claudia, and all the brothers send greetings to you
May the Lord dwell with your spirit. May grace remain with you all
